summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASSAQ Phase 2 - Core School Management System. All backend APIs (22 tests) passed 100%. Frontend UI testing confirmed all new features are working correctly: Teachers, Students, Classes, and Subjects management pages with full CRUD operations, language toggle (RTL/LTR) works system-wide, browser title displays 'NASSAQ | نَسَّق', and sidebar navigation includes all 4 management pages.
passed_tests: Language toggle button works on landing page (RTL ↔ LTR)
Teachers page has Add Teacher button
Teachers page displays teachers table with data
Add Teacher dialog opens with all form fields
Language toggle works on Teachers page
Students page has Add Student button
Students page displays students table with data
Classes page has Add Class button
Classes page displays classes table with data
Add Class dialog opens with all form fields
Subjects page has Add Subject button
Subjects page displays subjects table with data
Add Subject dialog opens with all form fields
Language toggle works on Subjects page (RTL ↔ LTR)
API: Duplicate teacher email correctly rejected

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components and flows working correctly

seed_data_creation: Test data created during API tests (teachers, students, classes, subjects) with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 testing complete. All 4 management pages (Teachers, Students, Classes, Subjects) are fully functional with CRUD operations. Language toggle works system-wide - clicking the globe icon toggles between Arabic (RTL) and English (LTR) on all pages. Language preference is stored in localStorage under 'nassaq_language' key. Browser title is 'NASSAQ | نَسَّق'. Sidebar navigation includes all management links. All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing. Backend APIs support full CRUD with proper authorization (platform_admin, school_principal, school_sub_admin roles). Admin credentials: info@nassaqapp.com / NassaqAdmin2026!##$$HBJ
